name: omniprod
description: Two-layer product quality system. Programmatic assertions + AI perspective review. Coverage-target exploration, multi-tab capture, cross-page correlation, incremental review. The final quality gate before shipping.

hooks.command: bash -c 'CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^(web/|web-hub/|web-agent/|packages/ui/)" | head -5); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo "Frontend files modified. Run /product-check <url> to verify visual quality."; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f .omniprod/screenshots/current/capture-plan.json ]; then echo "OmniProd capture plan exists at .omniprod/screenshots/current/capture-plan.json — re-read it after compaction to stay on track."; fi'
